name: Concierge Technologies, Inc.
summary: Concierge Technologies, Inc., through its subsidiaries, primarily provides investment fund management services in the United States, New Zealand, and Canada. It also operates as an investment advisor to exchange traded funds and exchange traded products organized as limited partnerships or investment trusts. In addition, the company produces, packs, and distributes gourmet meat pies and related bakery confections to the groceries, gasoline convenience stores, and independent retailers; and offers security alarm system installation and maintenance services to residential and commercial customers. Further, it manufactures and wholesale distribution of hair and skin care products under the Original Sprout brand name, as well as provision of private banking services to individuals and their families through its mobile platform. Concierge Technologies, Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in San Clemente, California.
